calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-03-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for entry of default ourt judgment.

Dept. 514; Judge Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:58:00 a.m. and concluding at 10:03:28 a.m.

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. represented by Eric Jun, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Juan Trucking LLC not appearing.

BENJAMIN SEEMAN is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff under direct examination and it examined by the Court.

Court haas reviewed all moving papers.
Court finds Plaintiff has established it's case in the pleadings.

After review, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc., and against Defendant Juan Trucking LLC, as follows:

Damages: $42,495.46
Prejudgment Interest: $10,417.12
Attorney Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $596.57

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $56,334.15

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2022 Continued To Dec-14-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
